response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrated professional experience with C++ on Windows platforms or direct exposure to capital markets/fixed income domains, which are mandatory requirements; their career is centered on web, mobile, and open-source tools using TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle or financial systems development.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated expertise in CI/CD, testing, and dev-ops practices
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education
concerns: No professional C++ or Windows platform experience in financial systems
Lacks fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL experience is listed but not contextualized in enterprise financial databases
